name: strategic-research
description: End-to-end strategic research pipeline. Five skills that chain: industry-process-map → audience-segment-research → willingness-to-pay-research → competitor-evaluation → strategic-synthesis-report. Each skill consumes the upstream YAML handoff and produces a structured artifact; the final skill renders a self-contained HTML report with executive summary, per-section analysis, cross-skill synthesis, tables, heatmaps, and interactive charts.

commands.name: strategic-research
commands.description: Run the full 5-skill strategic-research pipeline end-to-end, or resume from a specific step.
